title: Spanish Croquetas Recipe
description: A delicious Spanish-inspired snack recipe with a crispy exterior and a melted, cheesy interior. Serve with a side of tangy aioli for dipping.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the cubed bread and cook until toasted, stirring occasionally.
In a large bowl, combine the toasted bread, grated malai, and shredded tempting cheese.
Mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
Stuff each croquetas piece with the bread and cheese mixture.
Place the stuffed croquetas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with a little more olive oil and gently toss to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm with a side of tangy aioli for dipping.
